title: verbascum × insignitum
intro: Verbascum × insignitum, a hybrid species of the Verbascum genus, is a flowering plant known for its medicinal and ornamental properties. The plant's leaves, stems, and roots contain mucilage, which is used in traditional medicine to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Verbascum × insignitum include soothing coughs, reducing inflammation, and aiding in the relief of digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried into capsules, allowing for various forms of consumption.
